howItWorks.title: How
howItWorks.subtitle: Get justice in 4 simple steps. Our AI-powered platform makes legal processes accessible to everyone.

step01.title: Create Account
step01.description: Sign up in seconds with your phone number or email. No lengthy paperwork required.

step02.title: Submit Your Case
step02.description: Fill out a simple form describing your legal issue. Upload relevant documents securely.

step03.title: AI Processing
step03.description: Our AI analyzes your case, suggests relevant laws, and routes it to the appropriate court.

step04.title: Track & Resolve
step04.description: Attend virtual hearings, get real-time updates, and track your case till resolution.
